issues.description: Effect text describes a triggered ability with condition and action, but effects array is empty. Should contain: trigger=EndOfTurn, condition=Always, action=GiveDon (or similar) to set DON cards active
Card has effect text but no corresponding DSL effects defined

suggestedDsl.effectText: [End of Your Turn] You may trash this Character: Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.
